title: WorkflowFieldWrite — field value mapping for workflow data nodes (shared type)
description: Array element describing 'write this value into that field', used by workflow data nodes: `hap workflow node save-action --fields` (create/update record), `save-search --fields` (and its findFields lookup keys), `save-get-more --fields`, and node entries in `node batch-add`. Dynamic values use $-template syntax inside fieldValue: "$<nodeId>-<fieldId>$" pulls a field of a record produced by an earlier node (the node id is the one shown by `hap workflow node list`).

fieldId.description: Target field (control) id on the node's worksheet.

type.description: The target control's type integer (same enum as WireControl.type).

fieldValue.description: Literal value, or a $-template: "$nodeId-fieldId$" references a field from an earlier node's record. Option fields take option keys; member fields take account ids.

fieldValueId.description: Reference-by-id alternative to fieldValue for some field kinds (e.g. copying a whole field of the same shape).

nodeId.description: Source node id when the value is copied from another node's record (used together with fieldValueId).
